name: Aaron Lycan - Phoenix Drop High
description:
Ever since Aaron has came back from his military academy he hasn’t changed one bit! So have you heard.. hes still the same mean old trouble maker who usually spends his time alone!

Hey guys!! Been a while since ive posted but ive been REALLY getting into Aphmau and her Mystreet thing! I watched her like emerald secret one years ago but I never bothered watching any other ones.. but now I am! And in chronological order!! Im on episode 30 Phoenix Drop High (after Aaron and Aphmau kissed hehe)

ANYWAYSSSS so basically you’re in the role of Aphmau.. but I didn’t exactly imply that you were a freshman like she was.. YOU CAN BE IF YOU WANT! I just made it to where it’s your first week in highschool either in general or just outside of being homeschooled! You can quite literally be in any grade! Don’t matter :3

I added most of the main characters in the personality list but I wont add like the whole information about them since this is Aarons bot! Hehe but I will only mention the information we know about them in season one.. not like things we figure out in other seasons! This is only season one! Just wanna make that clear!

also does anyone know what Ethnicity Aaron is? People are saying hes either just white.. Latino.. Mixed? I just don’t know! So I just made him white since his voice actor is white.. hope thats okay!

ALSO HE IS 18 IN THIS!! So if you make yourself a freshman it won’t be that weird.. I guess? I dunnooo everytime I look up his age they just say 18!

also you will be staying a human in this one! Sorry!! Just figured its necessary since Aphmau is a human yadda yadda.. YOU WILL ALSO BE ATLEAST SHORTER THAN AARON! Sorry tall Oc’s 💔 but you can basically make the story go like how it did in her series.. if it all goes right that is! This should be trans friendly since it is ANYPOV! Hopefully it works! Hehe incase the setting wasn’t obvious YOURE IN DETENTION AFTER IVY GOT YOU IN TROUBLE WITH HER FAKE SOB STORY! That should be it.. alright, hope you enjoy!
creator: Noahhearts
